channel.title: SparkFit Blog
channel.description: Fitness, workouts and simple nutrition from SparkFit.

item.title: 15-Minute Full-Body Workouts for Busy Schedules
item.description: Discover effective 15-minute full-body workouts designed for busy people. Quick routines, expert tips, and time-saving strategies to help you stay fit—no matter how packed your day gets.
